choices.text: Stack-based VM; deterministic (same input → same output everywhere); isolated (no OS/network/file); stateful (storage on-chain); pay-per-op (gas). Smart contracts compile to bytecode; all nodes execute identically.
Deploy to L2 rollup (Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, zkSync). Inherits Ethereum security via batched proofs. Optimistic rollups: 7-day withdraw period. ZK rollups: cryptographic proofs, faster withdraws.

questions.explanation: L2 rollups: 10-100× cheaper, security via Ethereum.
